caption: A man with glasses and a voluminous, grey, pointed wig is recording a podcast in a room decorated with various framed photographs. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, and a red bowtie, wearing black over-ear headphones. He sits behind a black microphone and speaks, with his facial expressions and head position shifting slightly as he talks. On the screen, a logo appears that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". In the background, clothing is visible on racks, including items branded with "LEE". Throughout the sequence, the man remains the central focus, continuing to speak into the microphone while the camera captures a steady, medium shot of his upper body against the textured backdrop of the studio.
